  $(document).ready(function () {
    // SWIPER CALENDARIO
    var currentWeek=99;
    var swiperCalendarioHome = new Swiper(".calendario-home", {
      slidesPerView: 1,
      spaceBetween: 20,
      grabCursor: true,
      loop: false,
      allowTouchMove: false,
      initialSlide :(currentWeek-1),
      navigation: {
        prevEl: '.slidePrev-btn',
        nextEl: '.slideNext-btn'
      }
    });
    var swiperCalendarioHome2 = new Swiper(".calendario-home2", {
      slidesPerView: 1,
      grid: {
        rows: 3,
      },

      grabCursor: true,
      loop: false,
      allowTouchMove: false,
      watchSlidesProgress: true   

    });

    swiperCalendarioHome.slideTo(currentWeek-1);
    // SWIPER SERIE BKT
    var menu = ['Squadre', 'Calciatori' , 'Statistiche']
    //var menu = ['Squadre']
    var swiperSerieBKT = new Swiper(".swiperBKT", {
      speed: 600,
      hashnav: true,
      parallax: true,
      loop: false,
      grabCursor: true,
      calculateHeight: true,
      autoHeight: true,
      pagination: {
        el: '.swiper-pagination',
        clickable: true,
        renderBullet: function (index, className) {
          return '<span class="' + className + '">' + (menu[index]) + '</span>';
        },
      },

      scrollbar: {
        el: ".swiper-scrollbar",
        hide: false,
        draggable: true,
      },
    });

    swiperSerieBKT.on('slideChange', function () {
      $('html, body').animate({
        scrollTop: $("#swiperChampionshipHeader").offset().top
      }, 0);
    });
  });
</script>
